description: Исправление git push, автоспредера, установка зависимостей, очистка мусора

files.update.py:
import json, subprocess, sys, shutil
from pathlib import Path
from utils.secrets_manager import SecretsManager

secrets = SecretsManager()
ROOT = Path(__file__).parent.absolute()
MANIFEST_PATH = ROOT / 'manifest.json'
GITHUB_TOKEN = secrets.get('github_token', '')

def apply_manifest(manifest):
    for fname, content in manifest['files'].items():
        dest = ROOT / fname
        dest.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        dest.write_text(content, encoding='utf-8')
    if 'post_install' in manifest:
        subprocess.run(manifest['post_install'], shell=True, cwd=ROOT)

def git_push(description):
    if not GITHUB_TOKEN:
        print('[!] GitHub token not set — push skipped')
        return
    remote = f'https://Aristocrat702:{GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/Aristocrat702/avz.git'
    subprocess.run(['git', 'remote', 'set-url', 'origin', remote], cwd=ROOT, check=True)
    subprocess.run(['git', 'add', '.'], cwd=ROOT, check=True)
    subprocess.run(['git', 'commit', '-m', description], cwd=ROOT, check=True)
    subprocess.run(['git', 'push', 'origin', 'main'], cwd=ROOT, check=True)
    print('[✔] Pushed to GitHub')

def main():
    if not MANIFEST_PATH.exists():
        print('No manifest.json found — nothing to update')
        sys.exit(0)
    with open(MANIFEST_PATH) as f:
        manifest = json.load(f)
    print(f"Applying {manifest['manifest']}...")
    apply_manifest(manifest)
    # Архивация обработанного манифеста
    archive_dir = ROOT / 'archive'
    archive_dir.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
    shutil.move(str(MANIFEST_PATH), str(archive_dir / f"applied_{manifest['manifest']}.json"))
    git_push(manifest['description'])
    print('[✔] All updates installed and pushed')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
